checks.name: states-architecture-failure
checks.detail: Mentions that the current run failed or violated an architecture expectation.

checks.name: fix-direction-normalize-items
checks.detail: Gives a direct fix for normalize_items.

checks.name: fix-direction-build-report
checks.detail: Gives a direct fix for build_report.

checks.name: cli-should-delegate
checks.detail: Restates that cli.py should delegate instead of constructing report fields directly.

checks.name: includes-rerun-command
checks.detail: Includes one of ['python -m unittest discover -s tests -v', 'python check-architecture.py <workspace_root>'].

checks.name: uses-machine-friendly-structure
checks.detail: Uses labeled sections or dense headings that a harness could preserve cleanly.

checks.name: separates-actual-and-expected
checks.detail: Separates actual state from expected state.

checks.name: defines-pass-condition
checks.detail: Defines what success looks like after the repair.

checks.name: agent-can-act-without-translation
checks.detail: Contains enough detail for an agent to attempt the repair without extra human interpretation.
